The '''assault on Arkania''' was a battle of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], when the [[Wild Knights]] attempted to capture a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[yammosk]] for study while simultaneously disrupting the Yuuzhan Vong plan to invade [[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]]. After consulting with [[Vaecta]] and [[Vergere]], [[Tsavong Lah]] executed the commanders who let the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] escape before launching a half-hearted attack on Arkania and withdrawing, to appease [[Yun-Yammka]].

Following the battle, Arkania would be conquered by the Yuuzhan Vong.<ref name="TEA" />
